# REGIME READ — 2026-07-02

## Changes Since Previous Read
- **Stage: 3 → 3 (STAGE 3 SUSTAIN CONFIRMED, Day 2).** The Jul 1 read framed Stage 3 as "reclaimed Day 1 with Medium confidence, VXN sub-28 fired + VIX Day 2 sub-18 locked, confirmation window open through NFP Jul 3." Overnight into Jul 2: **VIX crushed further to 16.54 (-0.30% intraday Jul 2, Day 3 sub-18 lock with 1.46 pts inside threshold and 5.46 pts below 22 bearish)**, VXN held sub-28 at 27.69 (sub-28 Day 2 sustain), Brent extends fade to $70.39 (-1.65%) at 44.2% below 52W high, DXY softened to 101.11 (-0.28%), Gold firmed +0.37% to $4,083.30. **All Stage 3 bullish signals sustained; no reversal signals fired.**
- **Total score: +1 → +1 (unchanged, quality improved).** Same lens directions held but underlying quality strengthened: dealer flow VIX sub-17 Day 3 sustained; sentiment VIX 5.46 pts below bearish threshold; cross-asset Brent fade extends. Positioning + macro + breadth lens data cadence still lagging (last macro refresh Jun 26 = 4 sessions stale now).
- **Triggers from previous read:**
  - **Bullish — VIX close below 15 for 2+ sessions (→ Stage 2):** **NOT FIRED, gap narrowed to 1.54 pts** (from 1.69 Jul 1). 16.54 Jul 2 intraday still 1.54 above the Stage-2 trigger. Directionally closing.
  - **Bullish — VXN close below 25 for 2+ sessions (→ Stage 2):** **NOT FIRED, gap narrowed to 2.69 pts** (from 2.11 Jul 1 — wait, VXN backed up 0.58 pts to 27.69). Directional read: VXN +2.14% Jul 2 = **mild backup**, not extension of Jun 30 crush. Trigger further away, not closer.
  - **Bullish — SPX/NDX new relative highs:** **NOT FIRED**, both indices moved slightly against threshold (SPX -1.8% now vs -1.6% Jul 1; NDX -3.1% now vs -1.6% Jul 1). SPX -0.22%, NDX -1.54% Jul 2 = mild pullback from Jun 30 recovery highs. Not a Stage-3-break, but not extending either.
  - **Bullish — NFP Jul 3 in-line + no fresh policy shock:** **PENDING (1 session away)**. Cannot fire until Jul 3 08:30 ET.
  - **Bearish — NFP Jul 3 hot surprise:** **PENDING.**
  - **Bearish — VIX re-crosses above 20:** **NOT FIRED, gap WIDENED to 3.46 pts** (from 3.31 Jul 1). VIX moving away from bearish trigger.
  - **Bearish — VXN re-tests 30:** **NOT FIRED, gap slightly narrowed to 2.31 pts** (from 2.89 Jul 1). VXN +2.14% Jul 2 = mild backup toward 30 but no test.
  - **Bearish — TQQQ below 50DMA $76.39 + Nasdaq Comp re-breaks -5% concurrent:** **NOT FIRED.** NDX -1.54% Jul 2 = estimated TQQQ ~-4.6% (3× reset); Nasdaq Comp -4.2% (still inside -5% by 0.8 pts, narrower buffer than Jul 1's 1.4). TQQQ estimated ~$77-78 range likely still above 50DMA $76.39 by ~$0.6-1.6 (thin margin, needs broker confirm).
  - **Bearish — MOU walk-back / fresh geopolitical shock:** **NOT FIRED** (no incremental headlines in snapshot).
  - **Bearish — HY OAS through 300 bp:** **NOT REFRESHED** (data gap, Week 3+).
- **Notable lens flips:** No score changes — same +1 total, same directional composition. Underlying signal shifts: **dealer/sentiment quality strengthened** (VIX Day 3 sub-18 with widening margin to bearish), **cross-asset extended risk-on tell** (Brent -1.65% Jul 2 continues fade), **breadth quality mildly softened** (Nasdaq Comp -4.2% narrowing inside-threshold buffer from 1.4 → 0.8 pts, though still inside). **Net: Jul 2 is a "consolidation day" — Stage 3 continues to sustain but momentum of the Jun 30-Jul 1 recovery has cooled into NFP Jul 3 asymmetric event.**

> **Snapshot mix:** Equity indices + VXN = **Jul 1 Wednesday close** (ISM digested day; NDX -1.54% pullback from Jun 30 recovery high). VIX + DXY + Brent + Gold = **Jul 2 Thursday intraday** (pre-NFP session). 10Y last refreshed Jun 26 (4 sessions stale, held).
>
> **Headline signal #1 — VIX crushes further to 16.54 (-0.30% Jul 2). Day 3 sub-18 lock with 1.46 pts inside threshold and 5.46 pts below 22 bearish.** VIX/VXN spread widens to **11.15 pts** (from 10.42 pts Jul 1) — some Nasdaq-vol premium re-emerges on Jul 1's NDX -1.54% session, but broad-vol continues to normalize aggressively. **Reading: broad-market dealer positioning is at the deepest sub-18 lock in the cycle; the Nasdaq-concentration story is not gone but its premium is stable at ~11 pts vs the reclaim-day compression to 10.4.**
>
> **Headline signal #2 — NDX mild pullback to -3.1% (from -1.6% Jul 1). Nasdaq Comp -4.2% (from -3.6% Jul 1) narrows buffer inside -5% threshold to 0.8 pts.** NDX -1.54%, Nasdaq Comp -0.66%, SPX -0.22%, DJI -0.03%, RUT -0.39% = **Nasdaq-heavy pullback with mega-cap concentration**. Pattern: NDX ≫ Comp > RUT > SPX > DJI = **profit-taking on Jun 30 mega-cap-led rally, but no defensive rotation** (DJI held flat, RUT contained). Breadth internal read: soft pullback, not regime-break. **Confirms Stage 3 sustain but with reduced upside momentum into NFP.**
>
> **Headline signal #3 — Brent -1.65% to $70.39, extending fade to -44.2% below 52W high.** Second consecutive session of Brent weakness (Jul 1: -0.91%; Jul 2: -1.65% = cumulative -2.55%). **Cross-asset read: growth-concerns easing thesis extending; defensive-oil bid decisively fading.** Gold +0.37% mildly firm but off Jun 30 highs. DXY -0.28% to 101.11 = modest softening = mild dovish USD pricing = risk-on tilt marginal. **Cross-asset cluster: mild risk-on with defensive fade, extending from Jul 1's cluster with slightly stronger conviction on oil.**
>
> **Headline signal #4 — Consolidation session ahead of NFP Jul 3 08:30 ET.** All primary Stage 3 signals held; no reversal signals fired. The Jul 1 read's "confirmation window open through NFP Jul 3" is now T-minus 1 session. **Base case: Jul 3 NFP in-line delivers durable Stage-3 sustain and Stage-2 approach; tail: hot/cold surprise re-enters Stage 4.**
>
> **What's changed vs Jul 1:** Recovery-day momentum cooled to consolidation-day dynamics; VIX continues crushing but VXN backs up modestly (+2.14%); breadth buffer inside -5% narrows from 1.4 → 0.8 pts on Nasdaq Comp; cross-asset extends mild risk-on tell with Brent second-day fade. **Net: Stage 3 sustains with reduced momentum; positioning is "waiting on NFP" not "extending the reclaim."**

## Regime Stage Tracker
- **Current Stage: 3 — Neutral/choppy (VIX 15-22, range-bound). SUSTAIN DAY 2.** VIX 16.54 sits deep inside Stage 3 range with 1.46 pts inside sub-18 trigger and 5.46 pts margin to 22 bearish threshold. VXN 27.69 sits at Stage 3 upper zone (mildly elevated). Breadth Nasdaq Comp -4.2% holds inside -5% but narrower buffer (0.8 pts). Both Stage 4 criteria (rising VIX, deteriorating breadth) remain broken for 3+ sessions.
- **Stage Anchor:** Jul 1, 2026 — VXN sub-28 FIRED, VIX Day 2 sub-18 locked, Nasdaq Comp buffer restored, quarter-end orderly. Stage 3 = Day 2 of sustain into NFP Jul 3.
- **Position:** Stage 3 Day 2 into NFP Jul 3 (T-minus 1 session). **Confirmation window resolves Fri Jul 3 08:30 ET.** Base case Stage 3 sustain to Stage 2 approach: 55%; Stage 4 re-entry tail: 25%; extended Stage 3 churn: 20%. Bearish tail (Stage 5 re-entry) remains ~10% and requires cold-NFP + credit-spread widening confluence.
- **Confidence: Medium (held from Jul 1 Medium).** Why Medium (not High): (a) **NFP Jul 3 08:30 ET is 1 session away** — asymmetric binding event unresolved; (b) Nasdaq Comp buffer narrowed to 0.8 pts (thin margin — one NDX -1% session breaks -5%); (c) TQQQ Jul 1 close estimated ~$77-78 range, 50DMA sustain margin thin at ~$0.6-1.6 above; (d) Positioning + macro lenses stale/unrefreshed (10Y 4 sessions old, F&G Jun 17); (e) VXN back-up +2.14% Jul 2 = softening premium-concentration-cleared story mildly. Medium (not Low) because: (1) VIX Day 3 sub-18 with widening bearish margin; (2) all four Jun 30 bullish trigger fires held; (3) cross-asset cluster extends confirmation; (4) no reversal signals fired; (5) breadth still inside -5%.
- **Bullish trigger (→ Stage 2 mild-bullish/grind):** VIX daily close below 15 for 2+ sessions (currently 16.54, 1.54 pts away — closing) AND VXN close below 25 for 2+ sessions (currently 27.69, 2.69 pts away — backed up +0.58 vs Jul 1) AND SPX/NDX new relative highs (SPX -1.8%, NDX -3.1% — pulled back from Jul 1) AND **NFP Jul 3 in-line + no fresh policy shock**. Timeframe: Jul 3-8 confirmation window.
- **Bearish trigger (→ Stage 4 re-entry):** **NFP Jul 3 hot surprise (asymmetric bearish precedent — highest-probability trigger, ~25%) OR NFP Jul 3 cold surprise (~15% recession-fear branch)** OR VIX re-crosses above 20 (3.46 pts away — reversible on shock) OR VXN re-tests 30 (2.31 pts away — narrowed by Jul 2 backup) OR TQQQ close below 50DMA $76.39 + Nasdaq Comp re-breaks -5% concurrent (Nasdaq Comp buffer 0.8 pts) OR MOU walk-back / fresh geopolitical shock OR HY OAS through 300 bp on refresh.

## Regime Verdict
US risk environment **sustains Stage 3 (neutral/choppy) Day 2 with Medium confidence** — VIX Day 3 sub-18 lock deepens (5.46 pts below bearish), cross-asset extends mild risk-on with Brent second-day fade, all bullish trigger fires from Jun 30 held; NDX consolidates -1.54% pre-NFP on profit-taking not regime-break. Total score +1 (unchanged, quality strengthened on VIX/cross-asset, softened marginally on VXN backup + breadth buffer narrowing). **NFP Jul 3 08:30 ET is the binding resolution event 1 session ahead.**

## Diverging Signals
- **THE DOMINANT JUL 2 TENSION: VIX crushing while VXN backs up.** VIX -0.30% to 16.54 (Day 3 sub-18 lock deepening) vs VXN +2.14% to 27.69 (still sub-28 but modest backup). **VIX/VXN spread widens to 11.15 pts.** Reading: broad-market normalization aggressive; Nasdaq-concentration premium mildly re-emerges on NDX -1.54% session. This is **NOT a divergence signaling regime break** — it's a divergence signaling that mega-cap concentration risk remains marginally elevated even as broad-market vol collapses. Watch: if VXN backs up further while NDX pullback extends into NFP, concentration premium could re-widen materially.
- **Bullish trigger #1 (VIX sub-15) closing (1.54 pts) while bullish trigger #2 (VXN sub-25) moved further (2.69 pts).** Split direction across dealer-flow trigger set. Reading: broad-market vol has resolution capacity to Stage 2 (VIX 1.5 pts of work needed); Nasdaq-vol has 2.7 pts of work needed against a Jul 2 headwind. Nasdaq-vol is the binding gate to Stage 2, not broad-vol.
- **NDX -1.54% Jul 2 = biggest single-index pullback while SPX/DJI/RUT contained.** SPX -0.22%, DJI -0.03%, RUT -0.39% = mega-cap-concentrated pullback. Reading: profit-taking on Jun 29-30 mega-cap-led relief rally (NDX +6-8% cumulative over 3 sessions); not regime-signal reversal. Consistent with mid-pullback consolidation ahead of NFP.
- **Brent second-day fade (-2.55% cumulative) while Gold firms (+1.0% cumulative Jul 1+2).** Cross-asset internal tension: growth-easing (Brent) vs flight-to-safety (Gold). Net reading = mild risk-on but with some hedge demand persistent. Not a break signal; consistent with "cautious optimism into NFP."
- **NFP Jul 3 asymmetric event 1 session ahead in Stage-3-reclaim regime.** Base case in-line print = clean bullish confirmation with historical +1.5% to +1.6% SPX/NDX (Jun 2025 anchor). Hot surprise = -0.1% to -1.7% index move (2022-2023 anchors). Cold surprise = recession-fear -1% to -2%. **Sunday-morning tail-risk: NFP hot/cold delivers -2% to -6% TQQQ move on 3× amplification.** Path-risk remains asymmetric-downside for one specific reason: Nasdaq Comp buffer at 0.8 pts inside -5% is thin — hot/cold NFP + NDX -1% breaks buffer.
- **Positioning + macro lens stale-data risk deepening.** 10Y last refreshed Jun 26 = 4 sessions stale now. If yields quietly moved (unretrieved), macro score could shift materially on refresh. Flag: NFP Jul 3 will inevitably refresh macro read regardless. Positioning lens data gap continues.

Path-risk through NFP Jul 3 is materially amplified: NFP hot/cold surprise + one-sigma adverse path directly breaks 200DMA.** Descriptive: not a trade call; just the mechanics of where the estimated one-sigma path sits vs structural floor.

## TQQQ Read
- **Momentum:** RSI estimated ~52-56 — pulled back to midline neutral after Jul 1's estimated -4.62% session. Not overbought, not oversold. No reversal pressure yet; mean-reversion tailwind absent. **Neutral momentum backdrop after 2-day recovery cooled to consolidation.**
- **Market structure:** **SIDEWAYS held.** -12.4% from 4-wk high $88.09; +13.5% above 4-wk low $68.08. Downturn threshold $70.47 sits 9.7% below spot = 2 Jun-26-magnitude sessions of selling required for DOWNTURN switch. Not RALLY (not >30% above 4-wk low — need $88.50). **SIDEWAYS with reduced upside room after Jul 1 pullback consumed some cushion.**
- **Trend:** **Price estimated above 50DMA $76.39 (+1.1%, Session 3 sustain but thin margin).** 200DMA cushion +13.4%. The Jul 1 read's "Session 2 above-50DMA sustain likely" now sits at Session 3 sustain but with margin compressed from ~+6.1% to ~+1.1%. **Trend backdrop = above-50DMA-fragile.** One NDX -0.5% session Jul 2/Jul 3 breaks the 50DMA test — needs broker confirm.
- **Volatility & premium environment:** **VXN 27.69 (+2.14% Jul 1 close) — sub-28 Day 2 held but mild backup.** Est. TQQQ IV ~83% (from ~81% Jul 1 — small elevation). EM ~±11.6%. **The premium-rich-on-Nasdaq thesis is stable: dealers have not resumed concentrated hedge building, but Jul 1 mild backup reflects NDX -1.54% profit-taking absorbing some vol. Broad-market VIX at Day 3 sub-18 lock (16.54) = broad-vol continues to normalize; Nasdaq-vol backup indicates residual mega-cap concentration.** VIX/VXN spread widens to 11.15 pts (from 10.42 Jul 1) confirms broad-vs-Nasdaq bifurcation returning marginally. Reading: dealers in the "waiting on NFP" phase — no aggressive re-hedge, no aggressive further crush. **Premium structure: elevated (VXN 27) with mild Nasdaq-concentration tilt returning.**
- **Put-selling context: CAUTIOUS (held from Jul 1, tail-risk sharpened).** Held CAUTIOUS (not upgraded to FAVOURABLE) because: (a) **NFP Jul 3 in 1 session** — binding asymmetric event T-minus 24 hours; (b) **50DMA sustain margin thin at ~+1.1%** — one adverse session breaks; (c) **EM lower bound $68.2 back to one-sigma test of 200DMA + 4-wk-low confluence** — Jul 1 pullback eroded Jul 1's $3.6 structural buffer; (d) **Nasdaq Comp buffer inside -5% narrowed to 0.8 pts** — thin regime-cushion; (e) **VXN mild backup + VIX/VXN spread widening** = concentration premium marginally re-emerging; (f) **10Y macro data stale 4 sessions** + F&G stale — data-cadence uncertainty. Not HOSTILE because: (1) VIX Day 3 sub-18 lock 5.46 pts below bearish threshold = broad-market vol regime constructive; (2) all Jun 30 bullish triggers held; (3) cross-asset extends mild risk-on; (4) no reversal signals fired; (5) structural floor still exists at $68 200DMA + 4-wk low confluence 12% below. **Net: CAUTIOUS with NFP TAIL SHARPENED — Stage 3 sustains but Jul 1 pullback erodes structural cushion; NFP Jul 3 08:30 ET in 24 hours is asymmetric-downside binding event with one-sigma adverse path directly testing 200DMA. Materially reduced margin-of-safety vs Jul 1's post-recovery-high context. Context only — no strikes, sizes, expiries, or trade calls.**

## Forward Levels & Triggers
- **Bullish trigger (→ Stage 2 mild-bullish/grind):** VIX daily close below 15 for 2+ sessions (currently 16.54, 1.54 pts away — closing) AND VXN close below 25 for 2+ sessions (currently 27.69, 2.69 pts away — backed up +0.58 Jul 2) AND SPX/NDX new relative highs (SPX -1.8%, NDX -3.1% — pulled back from Jul 1) AND **NFP Jul 3 in-line + no fresh policy shock**. Timeframe: Jul 3-8 confirmation window.
- **Bearish trigger (→ Stage 4 re-entry):** **NFP Jul 3 hot surprise (highest-probability ~25%) OR NFP Jul 3 cold surprise (~15%)** OR VIX re-crosses above 20 (3.46 pts away) OR VXN re-tests 30 (2.31 pts away — narrowed by Jul 2 backup) OR TQQQ close below 50DMA $76.39 + Nasdaq Comp re-breaks -5% concurrent (Nasdaq Comp buffer 0.8 pts) OR MOU walk-back / geopolitical shock OR HY OAS through 300 bp on refresh.
- **Neutralizer:** NFP Jul 3 in-line + VIX sustained sub-17 + VXN crush back sub-26 = Stage 2 approach by Mon Jul 6. **Conversely:** NFP Jul 3 hot OR cold surprise + VIX bounce above 18 + VXN back through 30 = Stage 4 re-entry by Mon Jul 6.
